response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience in software development (13+ years) and leadership (multiple roles with team oversight), including contributions to developer tools and testing infrastructure. However, his experience in a formal people-management role is limited (no clear evidence of team leadership beyond technical mentorship), and his background leans more toward development than engineering productivity or mobile platforms. His leadership experience is more hands-on technical than people-focused.
strengths: Strong technical background with expertise in multiple languages and developer tooling (e.g., MCP, test automation, CI/CD).
Proven ability to lead technical projects and mentor teams (e.g., organizing workshops, code dojos).
Experience with mobile and web platforms, including iOS/Apple TV development and developer-facing tools.
concerns: Limited formal people-management experience (no clear team leadership roles beyond technical mentorship).
No explicit experience in mobile platform ecosystems or build systems for large-scale mobile platforms.
Career gap raises questions about current availability and commitment to a full-time leadership role.
